<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes; /** * Class PostWithSoftDeletingIncludeTrashed. * * A test model that uses the Sluggable package and uses Laravel's SoftDeleting trait * but includes trashed models. */ class PostWithSoftDeletingIncludeTrashed extends Post { use SoftDeletes; public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => 'title', 'includeTrashed' => true, ], ]; } }
